content.question: We do not know the current (2025/2026) national-level share of pupils in 6/8-grade tracks or its trend, nor whether the newly tightened informal maintainer thresholds are a nationwide pattern or a few high-profile Budapest cases.
content.reduction_path: Official KIFIR/Oktatási Hivatal admissions statistics disaggregated by track type and maintainer, published for the 2025/2026 and 2026/2027 cycles.
